title: Money and Shipwrights
description: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Kaku, Usopp, Zoro. The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: These iron plates on the mast...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I get a really weird nostalgic feeling...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: going merry suffered a lot of damage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There are leaks everywhere down below...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No. That's a waste of energy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Man! That looks like a metropolis!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No wonder the sea train goes here...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: look. It says "Blue Station" over there.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Maybe it's on the other side.

summary: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
